query: SELECT id, project_name, professor_name, university, url FROM project_matches WHERE url IS NOT NULL LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w6DdBww2bzwyZZ.root --database hB2F5YxeXakQRcL5WU36Vw --execute SELECT id, project_name, professor_name, university, url FROM project_matches WHERE url IS NOT NULL LIMIT 10;
